info.name: Chinese Learning Graph API
info.description: GraphQL API for Chinese word learning with mindmap relationships

request.description: Check if the backend service is running
Search for words containing specific characters
Get detailed information about a specific word
Get word relationship graph for mindmap visualization
Get daily recommended words for learning
Add a new Chinese word to the database
Add the word '好' (good) to test basic functionality
Create relationship between two words (requires word IDs)
Update an existing word (replace word_id_here with actual ID)
Get learning progress for a specific word
Record a learning session for a word
